testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:42:05.560 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.architectureplatform.ArchitectureplatformApplicationTests]: ArchitectureplatformApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:42:05.878 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.architectureplatform.ArchitectureplatformApplication for test class com.example.architectureplatform.ArchitectureplatformApplicationTests
